StreamingLobby.title: Watch Party
StreamingLobby.subtitle: Create a room or join an existing one
StreamingLobby.serverFullCap: Server is at full capacity ({current}/{max} rooms). Please wait for a room to close.
StreamingLobby.instructionTitle: How to create a Watch Party
StreamingLobby.step1Desc: Go to Movies or TV Shows, find and select what you want to watch.
StreamingLobby.step2Desc2: button on the top right corner of the video.
StreamingLobby.step3Desc2: in the lobby and copy the code to share with friends.
StreamingLobby.askHostJoin: Ask the host for the Room ID to join their session
StreamingLobby.createRoomStart: Create a room to get started
StreamingLobby.pleaseSignIn: Please sign in to join or create a streaming room.
StreamingLobby.closeRoomDesc: This will close the room and disconnect all viewers.
StreamingLobby.duplicateRoomError: You already have an active room for this content with the same audio track.
StreamingLobby.roomNotFound: Invalid Room ID or the room no longer exists.
StreamingLobby.deleteRoomFailed: Failed to delete room. Please try again.
StreamingLobby.createRoomFailed: Failed to create room. Please try again.
StreamingLobby.experienceStep1: Choose a movie or episode you love from the main site.
StreamingLobby.experienceStep2: Click Create Watch Party to get an invite lobby link.
StreamingLobby.experienceStep3: Share the invite lobby link with friends to watch and chat live together!
StreamingLobby.ruleRespect: Be polite and respect others in chat.
StreamingLobby.ruleNoSensitiveSpam: Do not share sensitive content or spam emoji.
StreamingLobby.ruleHeadphones: Use headphones for the most immersive watch-party audio.

StreamingRoom.noRoomDesc: Please join a room from the lobby or use an invite link.
StreamingRoom.signInDesc: You need to sign in to join a streaming room.
StreamingRoom.authFailed: Authentication failed. Please sign in again.
StreamingRoom.hostOnlyEpisodeSelect: Only the host can change episodes
StreamingRoom.episodePlaylistMissing: This room does not have episode metadata yet. Create a new room from the TV show page after Server 1 finishes loading to enable episode switching.
StreamingRoom.removedFromRoom: You have been removed from the room.
StreamingRoom.hostWillStartSoon: The host will start the stream soon
